name: Automation Anywhere, Inc.
h1: Automation Anywhere's GCC footprint in India
lede: Automation Anywhere runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Vadodara, covering engineering & design, built over sixteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Automation Anywhere office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Automation Anywhere GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Automation Anywhere runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Vadodara), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Automation Anywhere's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Vadodara, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 50 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Automation Anywhere operate in India?
faq.a: Automation Anywhere operates 3 active centers in India. Four are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Automation Anywhere have centers in?
faq.a: Automation Anywhere's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Automation Anywhere run in India?
faq.a: Automation Anywhere runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Automation Anywhere's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Automation Anywhere's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Automation Anywhere's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Automation Anywhere's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
